## Safety and Data

- [ ] Examples, schemas, mappings, and fixtures are synthetic, public-safe, or clearly redistributable.
- [ ] This PR does not add paid standards text, proprietary partner maps, restricted code lists, or real trading-party data.
- [ ] Raw EDI, partner IDs, names, addresses, and control numbers are not logged by default.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were handled according to `SECURITY.md`.
